title: centaurea elbrusensis
intro: Centaurea elbrusensis, also known as Elbrus knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea elbrusensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Centaurea elbrusensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, although its usage should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
